records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a Nicaraguan public authority or recognised racing operator publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed municipal material documents historical local horse-racing activity but does not establish a current national or recurring calendar.
limitations: The reviewed page is historical event coverage.
No current date-and-racecourse row is approved.
Parades and wider hipica activity must not be treated as horse-racing fixtures.
records.notes: Use explanatory treatment only until a current official racing calendar is reviewed.
